summary: Iteration 10 — validated all 7 requested features + regression for Aura Finance (pt-BR). Backend: created /app/backend/tests/test_freq_carryover.py (4 tests, all PASS) — quarterly & semiannual recurrence creation via POST /api/recurrences, invalid frequency rejection (422), and GET /api/transactions?include_carryover=false correctly hides current-month pending items when querying a future month. Frontend (mobile 390x844 + desktop 1280x900): (1) LOGIN wendy@demo.com/demo123 → dashboard-root OK. (2) MOBILE 'Mais' menu: mobile-nav-more opens mobile-more-sheet with 15/16 expected testids — see minor issue below. All items lançamentos/recorrências/parcelamentos/contas-a-receber/orcamento/carteiras/metas/despesas-compartilhadas/grupos/acertos/relatorios/notificacoes + perfil/configuracoes/logout present. Clicking more-nav-carteiras navigates to /carteiras. (3) RECURRENCES: rec-freq-select options = ['Semanal','Mensal','Trimestral','Semestral','Anual'] ✓. Created recurrence via UI with freq Trimestral (TEST_UI_Trimestral €77.77) → appeared in list with 'Trimestral' label. (4) LANÇAMENTOS repeat: tx-repeat-select present with type=Despesa, options = ['Não repetir','Semanal','Mensal','Trimestral','Semestral','Anual'] ✓. Switched type→Transferência and tx-repeat-select disappeared ✓. Selected Trimestral, filled amount/date/description, submitted → toast 'Pagamento recorrente criado' shown ✓; TEST_UI_TxTrim appeared on /recorrencias as Trimestral ✓. Editing an existing tx (tx-edit-*) opens 'Editar lançamento' dialog and tx-repeat-select is NOT present ✓. (5) MONTH-ONLY view: /lancamentos month=7/2026 → 7 rows all dated 07/2026 (14/07 and 01/07); NO 'Atrasada' badge anywhere on the page ✓. (6) MONTH PERSISTENCE: dashboard-month-select set to 3 → localStorage aura_period={year:2026,month:3}; navigate to /lancamentos → filter-month='3' ✓; back to / → dashboard-month-select='3' ✓. Then set filter-month=7 on /lancamentos, navigate to /carteiras and back → filter-month still='7' ✓. (7) REGRESSION: dashboard loads with month-select, cards, recharts; sidebar desktop nav works; editing tx works; theme toggle present. All test data cleaned up via API. Backend & frontend both 100% pass.

ui_bugs.issue: Painel item exists but its data-testid is 'more-nav-home' (fallback in Layout.jsx line 123: n.to.replace(/\//g,'') || 'home'). Spec expected 'more-nav-painel'. Testid mismatch only — item is present and clickable. Same for 'mobile-nav-home' (spec 'mobile-nav-painel') and 'nav-home' (desktop).

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1)/height(-1)' warnings during ResponsiveContainer mount which occasionally bubble as ResizeObserver-loop errors triggering the CRA dev error overlay. Benign in production build; had to remove the overlay iframe from DOM during Playwright interactions.

action_items: OPTIONAL (LOW): change Layout.jsx fallback in `n.to.replace(/\//g, '') || 'home'` to 'painel' (all 3 occurrences: nav-, mobile-nav-, more-nav-) so testids match the spec ('more-nav-painel', 'mobile-nav-painel'). Purely cosmetic for testability; behavior unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py `_advance()` (line 786) correctly implements quarterly=+3mo and semiannual=+6mo via relativedelta; `_FREQ_FACTOR` (line 1706) has 1/3 and 1/6 for dashboard aggregation — consistent.

GET /transactions include_carryover=false path (server.py ~line 603) branches BEFORE the union with pending prior-month items. Verified via test that a current-month pending tx does NOT appear when querying a future month with include_carryover=false.
Layout.jsx uses `n.to.replace(/\//g,'') || 'home'` for testid suffixes: acceptable but slightly less discoverable; align with route label ('painel') for consistency with automated specs.
Transactions.jsx: filter initialization order URL → localStorage 'aura_period' → today works as designed — verified persistence across navigation and reload sequences.

Recurrences.jsx rec-freq-select uses Radix; native <option> is also rendered for a hidden fallback <select>, which caused a `text=Trimestral` locator to resolve to 2 elements. Non-blocking, but consider gating the hidden fallback with aria-hidden or removing when Radix renders.
seed_data_creation: Created and CLEANED UP: recurrences TEST_UI_Trimestral & TEST_UI_TxTrim; transactions TEST_QuartRec, TEST_SemiRec, TEST_UI_Trimestral, TEST_UI_TxTrim via DELETE /api/recurrences/{id} and /api/transactions/{id}. Wendy's account restored to pre-test state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dev overlay from CRA can obstruct Playwright clicks due to Recharts ResizeObserver warnings — inject a small JS snippet to remove `body>iframe`, `#webpack-dev-server-client-overlay*` before interacting. localStorage key for period persistence is 'aura_period' with shape {year, month}. Recurrence POST REQUIRES both `start_date` and `next_run` fields. tx-repeat-select is a Radix button (not native SELECT) — use [role=option] to pick items. Editing tx uses testid pattern tx-edit-{id} and opens 'Editar lançamento' dialog without tx-repeat-select (by design).
